event.desc: Anomalous signal detected from Olympus Mons

colonist_actions.action: Ares proposes research_directive: study the anomaly
Vulcan considers proposing research_directive but one is already pending
Cosmo-29 considers proposing research_directive but one is already pending

diary_entries.entry: Population: 21. Anomalous signal detected from Olympus Mons. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Juno-28.
The alien_signal changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.
Population: 21. Anomalous signal detected from Olympus Mons. I spent the year on coding. Closest to Juno-26.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 35): 'I wonder if the data sloshing through our colony is someone else's frame output becoming our frame input.'
